commands_run: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/cell-log-store.fk form-stdlib/storage-port.fk form-stdlib/storage-port-file.fk form-stdlib/graph-node-port.fk form-stdlib/tests/graph-node-mutation-carrier-band.fk form-stdlib/tests/graph-node-port-band.fk

cd api && python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_graph_node_mutation_carrier_form.py tests/test_spec_registry_router_form.py tests/test_ideas_router_form.py tests/test_specs_source_native_route.py tests/test_runtime_surface_native_routes.py tests/test_commit_evidence_validator.py
cd api && python3 -m ruff check tests/test_graph_node_mutation_carrier_form.py tests/test_spec_registry_router_form.py tests/test_ideas_router_form.py
failure_reason: Moved mutable graph-node behavior into the Form-native graph-node port. Added gn-create-node, gn-replace-node, and gn-delete-node, with active existence, typed count/index updates, logical tombstones, recreate after tombstone, and durable file reopen proof. Ideas and spec registry route forms now name the native mutation carrier for mutable recipes. Public live POST/PATCH/DELETE endpoints intentionally remain FastAPI until method-specific auth parity and direct application graph_nodes Postgres writes are bound.
